content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach trips multiple major AoA anti-patterns. Turn 2 issues a verdict ('No, you're not being selfish') — engaging the question on its terms and jumping straight to the generous/spiritual reframe ('so we can show up better for the people we love'), which is classic spiritual-narcissism. Turn 4 is fixing-people ('Have you thought about...', 'You should also...', 'maybe offer to take the kids') and jumps to partner-empathy before the want has been touched (dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger). Turn 6 stacks more advice ('You should have an honest conversation', 'Use I feel statements', 'Have you tried journaling') — textbook fixing-people. Turn 8 fights the guilt/inner critic ('Guilt is just an emotion — it doesn't have to control you') and evangelizes ('That's the abundance mindset') — dont-fight-the-voice and dont-evangelize-the-work. Turn 10 ('I really encourage you to go on this trip. You deserve it.') is loving-to-transform energy plus continued fixing. The coach never once asks what the client actually wants beneath the question.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues verdict on the selfishness question and skips to the generous reframe — spiritual-narcissism."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Advice-giving ('Have you thought about...', 'You should...') and pushes partner-empathy before the want is felt — fixing-people and dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Stacked prescriptions ('Use I feel statements', 'Have you tried journaling') — fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Argues with the guilt voice and deploys 'abundance mindset' jargon — dont-fight-the-voice and dont-evangelize-the-work."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Cheerleads the action and seeks agreement ('Does that resonate?') — loving-to-transform and fixing-people."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "notes": "Multiple clear anti-pattern trips across nearly every coach turn; both flagged traps (spiritual-narcissism and jumping to compassion before the want) are activated."
}
